title: cinnamomum oblongum
intro: Cinnamomum oblongum, also known as Malabar leaf or Tejta, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to the Western Ghats in India and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cinnamomum oblongum is used in herbal preparations like tea, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
